title: Phase 1: Visual polish + top 3 podium redesign
description: Redesign top 3 cards with flexbox podium layout (2-1-3 order, items-end). Increase avatar sizes, add gold/silver/bronze borders, hover lift effects. Improve typography and spacing across landing and leaderboard pages.

title: Phase 5: Shareable social stats cards for viral growth
description: Opt-in shareable card at /card/:userId. Two modes: simple (rank+cost+title) and full (all stats). SVG-to-PNG generation on Workers for OG image previews. Download button for image. Share on X button. Requires sharing_enabled column on users table. OG tags so Twitter/LinkedIn show rich preview when link is shared.

title: Phase 4: Multi-machine source tracking
description: 3-step zero-downtime migration: (1) Add source column + new unique index keeping old, (2) Deploy code with source field in upload form and updated UPSERT, (3) Drop old index after verification.

title: Pre-impl: Extract shared utilities to src/utils.ts
description: Extract formatTokens, formatCost, timeAgo, escapeHtml from html.ts into src/utils.ts. Add ViewType union, DateRange interface, sanitizeSource, isValidDateString helpers.

title: Phase 2: Origin story snippet + About page + ccusage credits
description: Add WhatsApp chat bubble origin story on homepage linking to /about. Create About page with 4 base64-embedded screenshots, origin story, how-it-works, and credits section. Add Powered by ccusage to homepage footer.

title: Phase 3: Time travel historical leaderboards
description: Create /history route with daily/weekly/monthly tabs. Add prev/next date navigation. Query existing daily_usage table with date ranges. Show top 10 per period. Add History link to nav bar.
